section_miscategorizations.text: He uses Persa-gel daily on his face. He uses Elf facial cleanser in the morning and at night. He reports feeling greasy skin in the morning.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These statements describe dermatologic/skin status and ongoing product use that are not clearly related to the chief complaint of left hand pain. While they could be part of broader history, in this focused visit they function more as ancillary findings and are out of place in the HPI for hand pain.

section_miscategorizations.text: Continue use of Persa-gel as directed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a plan statement but pertains to acne/skin care rather than the presenting problem of left hand pain or carpal tunnel syndrome. It is organizationally confusing in the context of this visit, though still technically a plan item.
